text: legumes, whole grains and nuts. /c243Limit fat intake and shift from saturated to unsaturated fats. /c243Avoid trans-fatty rich foods ( vanaspati , bakery products and sweets). /c243Use low- fat milk. 55 56 Guideline 9 How much of physical exercise is needed? Exercise regularly and be physically active to maintain ideal body weight Rationale: /c52Physical activity of moderate intensity is recommended for health and well- being. /c52Physical activity is essential to maintain ideal body weight by burning excess calories and is of vital significance for health and prevention of non- communicable diseases. /c52Physical activity is a major modifiable risk factor in reduction of non- communicable chronic diseases. /c52Physical activity may reduce the risk of falls and injuries in the elderly.
